overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting a Victorian-style greenhouse herbology classroom. Sunlight filters through glass panes onto long wooden potting tables covered with magical plants, while students work and occasionally walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: greenhouse herbology classroom with potting tables and hanging plants

events.description: student in green robes enters from right foreground and walks across the stone floor toward center
two students in dark robes enter from right foreground and walk together across the greenhouse floor

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the greenhouse, observing students working at potting tables and watching pedestrians pass through

notable_agents.action: student in green robes walking from right side toward the center tables
pair of students in dark robes walking together from right side toward the background

entered.detail: Victorian-style iron and glass greenhouse roof with arched supports and transparent panels
long wooden tables arranged in rows, covered with various potted plants and gardening tools
potted plants suspended from chains attached to the glass ceiling structure
cobblestone or irregular stone tile flooring covering the greenhouse ground
dark iron structural beams and frames supporting the glass walls and roof

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a bright greenhouse classroom filled with lush vegetation and long potting tables. Sunlight streams through the glass roof and walls, illuminating students working at the tables. Throughout the segment, individual students and pairs occasionally walk through the space from right to left, crossing the stone floor between the tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a sun-drenched Victorian greenhouse that remains a hub of quiet academic activity. It begins with a wide view of the bright classroom, where lush vegetation and long potting tables are bathed in light streaming through the glass roof and walls. As the scene unfolds, the stillness is punctuated by the rhythmic movement of students working diligently at their stations. The composition then shifts focus to the stone floor, where individual students and pairs occasionally drift from right to left, crossing the open space between the tables. Finally, the camera lingers on the interplay of light and shadow as the students continue their tasks amidst the dense greenery.
